positive: An intricate and stylized abstract mural design featuring a flowing silhouette of mythical bioluminescent flora and fauna (e.g., glowing butterflies, serpentine roots, luminous mushrooms). The composition must be centrally balanced and suitable for a repeat pattern on apparel. Use a deep indigo and emerald teal color palette with electric cyan accents, emphasizing sharp contrast and clean line work. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau geometry and modern psychedelic illustration, rendered with high-definition linework and deep, saturated gradients. The entire scene should look like a sophisticated, scalable print-ready surface design, with a dominant sense of mystical energy and organic flow. Cinematic studio lighting, graphic novel quality, perfect symmetry, wallpaper art.
